paper.title: Developmental cell programs are co-opted in inflammatory skin disease

snippets: two sub-clusters of lymphatic endothelial cells defined by the differential expression of CCL21 and PDPN, which are higher in LE1 and LE2 respectively
the latter resembling PDPN+ collecting lymphatic vessels in human dermis
Endothelial cells in the healthy adult dermis comprise vascular endothelium (PECAM1, EMCN) and lymphatic endothelium (LYVE1, PDPN)
relevance: primary source: LE2 cluster definition as PDPN+ collecting lymphatic vessels
